special_mechanics.name: Erik - Run Speed
special_mechanics.description: Erik the Swift can run faster than the other two Vikings

special_mechanics.name: Erik - Helmet Bash
special_mechanics.description: Erik can bash through some walls and enemies with his helmet

special_mechanics.name: Olaf - Shield Block
special_mechanics.description: Olaf the Stout can block enemies and their projectiles with his shield

special_mechanics.name: Olaf - Hang Glider
special_mechanics.description: Olaf can use his shield as a hang glider for controlled descent

special_mechanics.name: Olaf - Shield Platform
special_mechanics.description: Olaf's shield can serve as a platform for other Vikings to stand on and reach higher areas

special_mechanics.name: Baleog - Sword Combat
special_mechanics.description: Baleog the Fierce can kill enemies with his sword

special_mechanics.name: Baleog - Bow and Arrow
special_mechanics.description: Baleog can attack enemies from a distance with his bow and has a lifetime supply of arrows. The bow can also hit switches from afar.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative data. Available sources describe character abilities and gameplay mechanics qualitatively but do not provide specific physics parameters such as velocity values, acceleration rates, or gravity constants. The game involves three characters with distinct movement and ability sets, but precise movement parameters are not documented in the provided sources.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - The Lost Vikings (SNES)
